meta.description: Structure data extracted from the Infinite Conflict manual HTML source.

units.name: Outpost Ship
units.description: Used to establish an outpost on an unoccupied planet. See Colonization.

units.name: Invasion Ship
units.description: Used to invade an enemy-occupied planet. See Invasion.

structures.name: Outpost
structures.description: Provides 50,000 housing for workers and 100,000 housing for soldiers. Produces resources and 200 workers per turn.

structures.name: Metal Mine
structures.description: Produces Metal. Production scales with planet abundance.

structures.name: Mineral Extractor
structures.description: Extracts Minerals. Production scales with planet abundance.

structures.name: Farm
structures.description: Produces Food. Production scales with planet abundance.

structures.name: Solar Generator
structures.description: Generates Energy.

structures.name: Leisure Centre
structures.description: Increases Birth Rate by 0.5% per turn.

structures.name: Launch Site
structures.description: Enables building of orbital structures.

structures.name: Living Quarters
structures.description: Provides 50,000 Housing.

structures.name: Habitat
structures.description: Provides 100,000 Housing.

structures.name: Comms Satellite
structures.description: Allows you to see all the fleets moving into the same system, and allows you to scan planets.

structures.name: Ship Yard
structures.description: Enables production of basic ship designs.

structures.name: Colony
structures.description: Provides 100,000 housing and unlocks Tier 2 structures.

structures.name: Light Weapons Factory
structures.description: Required for production of military ships and to build Army Barracks.

structures.name: Army Barracks
structures.description: Enables training of soldiers, and provides housing for 250,000 soldiers.

structures.name: Research Lab
structures.description: Enables advanced research and provides housing for 25,000 scientists.

structures.name: Core Metal Mine
structures.description: Advanced Metal Mine with higher output.

structures.name: Core Mineral Extractor
structures.description: Advanced Mineral Extractor with higher output.

structures.name: Hydroponics Lab
structures.description: Advanced orbital farm with higher output.

structures.name: Solar Array
structures.description: Advanced orbital energy generator with higher output.

structures.name: Hyperspace Beacon
structures.description: Decreases travel time by 25% for owned ships only. Required at destination planet only.

structures.name: Metal Refinery
structures.description: Increases metal abundance by 30.

structures.name: Mineral Processor
structures.description: Increases mineral abundance by 30.

structures.name: Food Purifier
structures.description: Increases food abundance by 30.

structures.name: Energy Booster
structures.description: Increases energy abundance by 30.

structures.name: Metropolis
structures.description: Provides 200,000 housing and unlocks Tier 3 structures.

structures.name: Heavy Weapons Factory
structures.description: Required for production of advanced military ships: destroyers and battleships.

structures.name: Space Dock
structures.description: Required for production of advanced ships.

structures.name: Hospital
structures.description: Increases Birth Rate by 0.5% per turn.

structures.name: Land Reclamation
structures.description: Increases the ground space of the planet by 1.

structures.name: Orbital Clearing
structures.description: Increases the orbital space of the planet by 1.

structures.name: Jump Gate
structures.description: Decreases travel time by 25% to all ships of the same alliance. Required at both origin and destination planet.

structures.name: Strip Metal Mine
structures.description: Highest-tier metal mine with massive output.

structures.name: Strip Mineral Extractor
structures.description: Highest-tier mineral extractor with massive output.

structures.name: Hydroponics Dome
structures.description: Highest-tier orbital farm with massive output.

structures.name: Solar Station
structures.description: Highest-tier orbital energy generator with massive output.
